testcase.name: test_create_subscription
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscriptions_ota.py:123: in test_create_subscription assert subscription["plan_id"] == plan_id ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'plan_id'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_subscriptions_ota.py:149: in test_update_subscription_status_pause assert updated["status"] == "paused" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'status'

testcase.name: test_update_subscription_status_cancel
